## Summary
One-line description of the change.

## Motivation / Context
Why is this change needed? Link to issue if applicable.

## Changes
- Bullet list of files / behaviors changed
- (Keep PRs small and focused when possible)

## Testing
- How did you test? (manual on YouTube home/sidebar/search, popup toggles, clear, etc.)
- Any console warnings with debug on?
- Affected surfaces: homepage / sidebar / search / watch page?

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` (or `web-ext lint`) passes (once dev deps installed)
- [ ] Local hiding + YT signal still work for the affected flows
- [ ] No unnecessary permissions or host changes in manifest
- [ ] README / comments updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Screenshots / Notes (optional)
Attach before/after or console snippets for UI changes.
